name: modern-cobalt2-vscode
description: A modern take on the Cobalt2 colour scheme — deep navy blues with golden accents

scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "🔖 chore(release): bump to $V" && git tag "v$V" && git push && git push --tags && echo "Bumped to v$V"
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "🔖 chore(release): bump to $V" && git tag "v$V" && git push && git push --tags && echo "Bumped to v$V"
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && V=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "🔖 chore(release): bump to $V" && git tag "v$V" && git push && git push --tags && echo "Bumped to v$V"
